---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an enhancement or new capability
title: "[feat]: "
labels: ["enhancement"]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What problem are you trying to solve? Who is affected? Why does it matter?

## Proposed solution

Describe the change you would like to see. Include API shape, UI mock, or
example usage if helpful.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about and why you set them aside.

## Additional context

Links to prior art, related issues, or screenshots.
